name: harness
description: Spec-first development workflow automation for Codex and Claude Code

interface.shortDescription: Spec-first workflow automation for requirements, blueprinting, execution, and verification.
interface.longDescription: Harness derives requirements from intent, turns them into a validated plan.json via harness-cli (scripts/cli.sh), and coordinates execution with 27 plugin-native role prompts through the current Codex subagent runtime.
defaultPrompt: Derive precise requirements for this change.
Turn these requirements into a validated plan.
Execute this Harness plan and verify every task.
